ValidationRule.description: Prevent users from saving a User Story with "Run Relevant Tests" selected in the Promotion Test Level field when the User Story belongs to a Metadata Format Pipeline
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(copado__Promotion_Test_Level__c, 'RunRelevantTests'), OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(copado__Project__c)), ISPICKVAL(copado__Project__r.copado__Deployment_Flow__r.copado__Platform__c, 'Salesforce') ), AND( ISBLANK(copado__Project__c), NOT(ISBLANK(copado__Release__c)), ISPICKVAL(copado__Release__r.copado__Project__r.copado__Deployment_Flow__r.copado__Platform__c, 'Salesforce') ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: “Run Relevant Tests” is not supported for Metadata Format Pipelines. Please select a different test level.
